ofm.title: OnlyFans 2026 crackdown is live
ofm.summary: Biometric verification, AI detection tools, and 30-40% revenue penalties for violators. DMs still drive 60-70% of revenue—but AI chatbots can't match human emotional connection. The people making the most money are selling courses, not running AI models.

ofm.title: OnlyMonster dominates OFM tech
ofm.summary: Rapidly becoming the go-to management system and desktop browser for agencies—outpaced all competitors in Beta without even a website. Heavy AI integration into OF workflow.

ofm.title: Fanvue raised $22M Series A
ofm.summary: (Jan 2026) from Inner Circle—same investors behind Revolut and Anthropic. Positioned as the AI-friendly creator platform with explicit AI-generated model policies.

ofm.title: AI influencer market hit $6.06-6.95B in 2026
ofm.summary: , growing 26% annually. Fanvue is the leader for direct AI model monetization; TikTok/IG Reels still king for viral growth.

ofm.title: Platform-specific insight
ofm.summary: OnlyFans is tightening enforcement while Fanvue is embracing AI models with clear disclosure requirements. Strategic implication—diversify platform presence now.

tools.title: OpenClaw 2026.4.1 just dropped
tools.summary: (42 min ago on npm): 45 new features, 13 breaking changes, 82 bug fixes. Plugin API compatibility improvements and safer defaults.

tools.title: Claude Code worktree isolation
tools.summary: Subagents can now use worktree isolation (`isolation: worktree` in frontmatter) to work in parallel without conflicts. Critical for multi-agent OFM workflows.

tools.title: Awesome Claude Code repo
tools.summary: Curated list of skills, hooks, slash-commands, and agent orchestrators. AgentSys workflow automation system available.

tools.title: Claude Code Workflow framework
tools.summary: JSON-driven multi-agent cadence with intelligent CLI orchestration (Gemini/Qwen/Codex), context-first architecture.

tools.title: Claude Code /loop command
tools.summary: Build complex automation systems combining skills, subagents, and external integrations. Run nightly deployments, daily tests, weekly security audits.

market.title: Tulum ATV rental market
market.summary: Fragmented competition. The Lagoon Company ranks well but "Tulum ATV Rental" claims "no competitors"—aggressive positioning. New entrant "La Veleta" getting TripAdvisor traction. Market ripe for consolidation play.

market.title: Rammed earth construction
market.summary: Earth USA 2026 conference (Sept 18-20, Santa Fe) expanding scope to include adobe, rammed earth, compressed earth blocks. Baja Blox manufacturing CEBs in Baja California Norte—potential supplier connection for Oaxaca build.

market.title: Puerto Escondido real estate window closing
market.summary: Strong fundamentals with international demand, improved infrastructure, year-round occupancy. Large beachfront lots (1,000-3,000 sqm) still significant value vs Tulum/Playa—but infrastructure-driven appreciation is narrowing entry window.

market.title: Santerra House precedent
market.summary: Parma Arquitectura built rammed earth/burnt timber weekend home in Valle de Guadalupe wine region for under $80K—proof of concept for low-cost earth construction in Mexico.
